## New Resource Submission

### Resource details
- **Name:**
- **URL:**
- **Target category:** (must match existing category name)

### Why this resource should be included
- Briefly explain quality, usefulness, and relevance.

### Verification checklist
- [ ] I confirmed the resource URL is reachable.
- [ ] I verified this resource is not already listed.
- [ ] I used a concise, neutral description.
- [ ] I updated the structured source (`/data/listings.json`) instead of manually editing generated markdown.
- [ ] I ran generation/validation steps locally:
  - [ ] `cd /home/runner/work/awesome-entertainment/awesome-entertainment/website && npm run generate`
  - [ ] `cd /home/runner/work/awesome-entertainment/awesome-entertainment/website && npm run typecheck && npm run build`
